ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crm_solutions" (
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CRM solution */,
  "crm_name" TEXT /* Name of the CRM solution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the CRM solution */,
  "pricing" REAL /* Pricing information for the CRM solution */,
  "features" TEXT /* List of features offered by the CRM solution */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the CRM solution */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the CRM solution */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the CRM solution */,
  "support_url" TEXT /* URL for customer support or documentation */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the logo or a representative image of the CRM solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decision_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision-making criterion */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the decision-making criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the decision-making criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or importance factor for the criterion */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the criterion is mandatory for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crm_criteria" (
  "crm_criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CRM solution-criterion pair */,
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRM solution */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decision-making criterion */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the CRM solution for the decision-making criterion */,
  "is_met" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the CRM solution meets the criterion */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the criterion for the specific CRM solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crm_criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crm_criteria_crm_id FOREIGN KEY ("crm_id") REFERENCES crm_solutions ("crm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crm_criteria_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES decision_criteria ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRM solution */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user to the CRM solution */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the CRM solution is a favorite of the user */,
  "comparison_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has compared this CRM solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_crm_id FOREIGN KEY ("crm_id") REFERENCES crm_solutions ("crm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRM solution */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user to the CRM solution */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the review is from a verified user */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_crm_id FOREIGN KEY ("crm_id") REFERENCES crm_solutions ("crm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the feature */,
  "is_core" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the feature is a core feature of the CRM solution */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., sales, marketing, customer service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crm_features" (
  "crm_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CRM solution-feature pair */,
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRM solution */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "is_supported" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the feature is supported in the CRM solution */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the feature in the context of the CRM solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crm_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crm_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crm_features_crm_id FOREIGN KEY ("crm_id") REFERENCES crm_solutions ("crm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing plan */,
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRM solution */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the pricing plan */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "trial_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the free trial period */,
  "features_included" TEXT /* List of features included in the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_plans_crm_id FOREIGN KEY ("crm_id") REFERENCES crm_solutions ("crm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment pattern */,
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRM solution */,
  "deployment_pattern" TEXT /* Deployment pattern of the CRM solution */,
  "is_cloud" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the deployment is cloud-based */,
  "is_on_premise" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the deployment is on-premise */,
  "additional_requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements for the deployment (e.g., hardware specifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_crm_id FOREIGN KEY ("crm_id") REFERENCES crm_solutions ("crm_id")
)
